headlines.description: — Chet Holmgren had 28 points and eight rebounds, Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 26 points and the Oklahoma City Thunder edged the New York Knicks 103-100 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Holmgren and Gilgeous-Alexander help Thunder edge the Knicks 103-100

headlines.description: — Kon Knueppel scored 20 points and the Charlotte Hornets extended their win streak to six games with a a 118-89 win over the Boston Celtics on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Knueppel scores 20, Hornets beat Celtics 118-89 to earn 6th straight win, move above .500

headlines.description: — Quentin Grimes hit two tiebreaking free throws with 16.4 seconds remaining, Tyrese Maxey scored 25 points and the short-handed Philadelphia 76ers beat the Utah Jazz 106-102 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Quentin Grimes' late free throws help the 76ers send the Jazz to a 7th straight loss

headlines.description: — Jrue Holiday had 35 points and 11 assists, and Jerami Grant added 30 points as the Portland Trail Blazers snapped a two-game skid with a 122-114 win over the Memphis Grizzlies on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Holiday and Grant power the Trail Blazers to a 122-114 win over the Grizzlies

headlines.description: — Nickeil Alexander-Walker scored 23 points and the Atlanta Hawks defeated the slumping Milwaukee Bucks 131-113 on Wednesday night to win their fifth straight game and move above .500 for the first time since December.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hawks beat slumping Bucks 131-113 to win 5th straight and climb above .500

headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard scored 29 points, Bennedict Mathurin scored 23 on 8-for-11-shooting, and the Los Angeles Clippers won their third in a row, 130-107 over the Indiana Pacers on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leonard scores 29 as the Clippers beat the Pacers 130-107 for a third straight win
